display.purpose: Homepage hero only; italic em in Signal Cyan is the one flourish.

headline.purpose: Section h2s; always .serif, always sentence case, never bold.

body.purpose: Inter on Harbor Gray; 46-65ch max width.

label.purpose: Plex Mono uppercase kickers and captions; 0.7rem floor.

motion.name: fade-up
motion.purpose: Section reveal on scroll; neutralized under prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Primary CTA Button
components.description: The one filled action per view; cyan pill, dark text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #7fd7e2; color: #0c131e; padding: 14px 28px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(127,215,226,0.5); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action; cyan text on a cyan 30% border.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #7fd7e2; padding: 12px 24px; border: 1px solid rgba(127,215,226,0.3); border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(127,215,226,0.08); }

components.name: Kicker
components.description: Mono uppercase section label; replaces every pill badge.
components.css: .ds-kicker { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #7fd7e2; }

components.name: Panel Card
components.description: Flat panel on hairline border; hover shifts border, never elevation.
components.html:
Approval pipelines

Multi-step conditional routing for POs, vacations, and large expenses.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #141d2c; border: 1px solid rgba(233,237,244,0.10); border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: rgba(127,215,226,0.3); } .ds-card-title { color: #e9edf4; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.02rem; font-weight: 600; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-card-body { color: #8fa0b3; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.625; margin: 0; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form field; darker-than-panel well, focus shifts border to cyan.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="e.g. Acme Construction LLC" />
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #0c131e; color: #e9edf4; border: 1px solid rgba(233,237,244,0.10); border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 16px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #5f6e85; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: rgba(127,215,226,0.5); }

components.name: Serif Headline
components.description: Section h2: Newsreader medium, sentence case, never bold.
components.html: Built for operators, wherever you operate
components.css: .ds-headline { font-family: Newsreader, Georgia, serif; font-size: 2.25rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.2; color: #e9edf4; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: Editorial dark, not dashboard dark: the confidence of a systems firm that draws its own schematics, set after hours. Serif headlines with real presence, mono labels that behave like margin notes, hairline-divided panels instead of floating cards, and the animated Wiring Diagram doing the proving. Density is calm; nothing glows, nothing floats, nothing counts up.
keyCharacteristics: Serif display carries personality; sans body carries information; mono carries labels
Hairline grids instead of floating card grids
Cyan acts, violet protects, no third accent
Sentence case everywhere except mono labels

rules.name: The Two-Light Rule
rules.body: Cyan is motion and action; violet is protection. No third accent exists.

rules.name: The Contrast Floor Rule
rules.body: No text on any dark surface may fall below #7d90a1. Quieter means smaller or absent, not dimmer.

rules.name: The Kicker Rule
rules.body: Sections are labeled by a mono uppercase kicker above a serif headline. Never a pill, never a badge.

rules.name: The Sentence Case Rule
rules.body: Headlines and CTAs are sentence case. Title Case is a template tell.

rules.name: The No-Glow Rule
rules.body: If an element casts colored light, it's wrong. The only blur is the diagram node bloom.

dos: Do label sections with mono uppercase kickers above serif sentence-case headlines
Do use hairline grids with icons inline beside headings
Do keep every claim defensible; qualitative phrasing over uncited precision
Do keep bilingual as a capability line, one placement per surface
Do hold the contrast floor (#7d90a1) and label floor (0.7rem)
donts: Don't ship 'dark theme + glowing gradients + we-build-AI-agents sameness' (PRODUCT.md anti-reference)
Don't use pill badges, icon tiles above headings, identical card grids, or hero-metric stat tiles
Don't use em dashes in copy
Don't write Title Case headlines or local-vendor copy ('We're your neighbors' is banned verbatim)
Don't use font-bold on serif headlines or borders thicker than 1px as colored accents
Don't add a third accent color
